form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr1) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 10 m by Precocious Kate (1:59.00) in 3yo+ NR 40 to 45 on April 10 at $5.50. Before that, a game effort when 2nd (Sr1) over 1850m at Marburg beaten 5 m by Lulu Lucifer (2:17.90) in 3yo+ NR 43 to 48 on April 5 at $6.50. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into eighth behind Precocious Kate at Albion Park over 1660m in a 3yo+ NR 40 to 45 on April 10 at $5.50. Performed better the start before with a good run when 2nd (Fr2) over 2040m at this track beaten 7 m by Ashlee Nitro (2:29.90) in 3yo+ NR 41 to 47 on April 2 at $4.20. Ready to make amends.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr3) over 1780m after showing early speed at this track beaten 6 m by Mullum Doc (2:10.20) in 3yo+ NR 40 to 45 on April 9 at $2.70. Before that, a solid effort when 3rd (Fr3) over 1780m after racing wide at this track beaten 3 m by Snip Of Beauty (2:10.40) in 3yo+ NR 40 to 44 on April 1 at $1.90. Can bounce back.

form.formComment: Last start by a neck (Sr1) at this track (2:10.20) beating Emmaleen in 3yo+ NR 40 to 45 on April 9 at $6. Big chance of back-to-back wins.

form.formComment: Resumes. At the latest first-up run 2nd (Fr2) over 1800m after showing early speed at Globe Derby Park, beaten a head by Bettor Be Lively (2:12.00) in NR up to 59 GH on February 18 2023 at $3.20. Keep safe.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 7th (Fr1) over 1660m after showing early speed at Albion Park beaten 18 m by Miss Bay King Cole (1:56.50) in 3yo+ NR 45 to 50 on April 10 at $8. Showed ability the race before when he won by 2 m (FT Fr2) at Marburg (2:47.70) beating Edward Jay in 4yo+ NR 40 to 70 on April 5 at $12. Among the chances on best form.
